message:
test(fj-conformance): add 26 oracle tests for Transpose primitive

Comprehensive coverage of lax.transpose behavior:
- 2D transpose: default (reverse), explicit permutation, identity, square/wide/tall
- 3D transpose: swap axes, rotate left/right, identity, full reversal
- 4D transpose: reverse all, swap middle axes
- 1D transpose: identity behavior
- Scalar transpose: pass-through
- Float tensors: F64 2D and 3D
- Algebraic properties: double transpose = identity, inverse permutation
- Edge cases: single element, unit dimensions, negative values

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
